final_prompt.prompt:
Create a tri-fold travel brochure for a 4-day, 3-night Hangzhou self-guided itinerary, intended for Xiaohongshu travel-attack sharing, in the warm reverence of mid-century travel posters.

Style/medium: tri-fold travel brochure with the matte cardstock honesty of mid-century tourist literature, landmark cutouts floating above the map like pressed memories, designed to be unfolded as a quiet ritual
Composition: tri-fold layout with a real Hangzhou geographic map as the central spine, 4 clearly divided day-panels, famous landmark illustrations as floating cardstock cutouts with soft drop shadows above the map base
Subject: 
  Day 1 panel — West Lake classic loop: 断桥残雪 / 白堤 / 孤山 / 曲院风荷 / 苏堤春晓 / 花港观鱼 / 雷峰塔 / 柳浪闻莺; depart 7:30, sunrise at 断桥, 孤山 bamboo courtyard, 雷峰塔 golden-hour panorama; lunch 楼外楼 (东坡肉 + 龙井虾仁, 人均150元); tip: shared bike 5元/hr
  Day 2 panel — Zen Hangzhou: 灵隐寺 / 飞来峰造像 / 法喜寺 / 宋城; highlights: 咫尺西天 wall blessing, 十八籽 bracelet 46元, 法喜寺 rooftop angle of yellow walls and grey tiles, 《宋城千古情》VIP seat 320元; dinner 素描餐厅 人均90元
  Day 3 panel — Tea hills & streams: 九溪十八涧 / 龙井村 / 十里琅珰 / 云栖竹径; highlights: barefoot stream walk, 明前龙井 tasting 50元/杯, hands-on tea roasting (pre-book), 《卧虎藏龙》bamboo sea; shuttle bus 8元; dinner 茶人村 人均120元
  Day 4 panel — Option A 运河文艺线: 拱宸桥 / 桥西历史街区 / 小河直街 / 大兜路香积寺, 中国伞/刀剪剑博物馆 (free), water bus line 1 (3元); Option B 西溪湿地: 周家村 / 深潭口 / helium balloon 180元; souvenirs: 南宋胡记荷花酥 38元/盒, 万事利丝绸方巾 150-300元
  Sidebar: accommodation picks (杭州君悦酒店 lake-view / 青芝坞民宿 200元) and avoid (train station area); transport: Alipay metro code, Airport→West Lake Line 1 (7元/50min), 灵隐寺 7W bus from 龙翔桥 (5元)
Scene/backdrop: Hangzhou geographic map base with West Lake, Lingyin hills, Xixi wetland, and Grand Canal all visible; fine route lines connecting day-panels across the real city geography
Lighting/mood: the warm honey light of a curated travel memory, golden hour holding the lake and hills in soft reverence, a quiet glow that makes the viewer feel the trip has already begun
Color palette: warm honey earth tones in conversation with West Lake jade-green and canal blue, the trust between traveler and land, accents of temple-wall ochre
Materials/textures: matte cardstock with crisp paper folds and a soft floating shadow under each landmark cutout, the tactile pleasure of a well-made travel object
Text (verbatim): 断桥残雪 / 白堤 / 孤山 / 曲院风荷 / 苏堤春晓 / 花港观鱼 / 雷峰塔 / 柳浪闻莺 / 灵隐寺 / 飞来峰 / 法喜寺 / 宋城 / 九溪十八涧 / 龙井村 / 十里琅珰 / 云栖竹径 / 拱宸桥 / 桥西历史街区 / 小河直街 / 大兜路香积寺 / 西溪湿地 / 深潭口 / 《宋城千古情》/ 咫尺西天 / 《卧虎藏龙》/ 楼外楼 / 素描餐厅 / 茶人村 / 杭州君悦酒店 / 青芝坞民宿 / 南宋胡记荷花酥 / 万事利丝绸方巾
Constraints: 4 day-panels clearly visible and labeled, real Hangzhou geographic accuracy on the map base, all景点 and dining recommendations preserved, tri-fold structure legible at print scale
Avoid: information dumped as a single text block, generic stock-photo travel poster aesthetic, Western tourism brochure cliché, floating cutouts losing their shadow depth
